generation_plan: Manual examples converted. Target Clarity=2, Request-orientedness=2.

turns.user: "Can I change it to medium instead?
Actually, I like to close all the windows.

raw_conversation:
--------------

User: "Open my windows."
Assistant: Driver windows is now open.
User: "Can I change the open position to 20%?
Assistant: "Driver window position set to 20% open.
User: "Actually, I like to have also some seat heating."
Assistant: "Seat heating is on now."
User: "Can you set the heating to medium?"
Assistant: "Car seat heating set to medium."

User: "Turn on the fog lights."
Assistant: "Can you specify which fog lights I should turn on?"
User: "The front and left ones."
Assistant: "Front and left fog lights turned on."
User: "Turn of all interior lights."
Assistant: "All interior lights turn on."
User: "Can you set them instead to medium?"
Assistant: "Interior light set to medium."
